MOTION To Compel Standard Insurance Company'S (1)Further Responses To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, (2) Standard'S Person(S) Most Knowledgeable At Deposition, And (3) For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATIE J. SPIELMAN, TEL. NO. 433-8000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES J. MOAK OF THE MESERVE, MUMPER & HUGHES LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 620-0300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF RACHEL GRAYBILL-BUNDGARD'S MOTION To Compel Standard Insurance Company'S (1)Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, (2) Standard'S Person(S) Most Knowledgeable At Deposition, And (3) For Sanctions is Granted in Part. On or before October 3, 2011, Defendant must supplement its RFP responses by providing a privilege log as to any documents withheld on a claim of privilege and by supplementing its responses to Numbers 2, 6, 8 and 13 by producing any additional responsive documents or by stating that there are none after a diligent search of Defendant's electronic files. The response to No.2 may be limited to documents relating to Plaintiff. On or before October 14, 2011, Defendant must produce a witness in response to the deposition notice. PERFORMANCE TO BE DONE BY OCTOBER 3, 2011. As to RFP numbers 10, 20 and 21, the motion is continued to 9/15/11 for the parties to further meet and confer and determine whether they will agree to a protective order. Defendant's counsel must read and comply with CRC 3.1113(f). The court did not award sanctions. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
